===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Shauna anime.png|thumb|250px|Shauna in {{aniseries|XY}}]]
{{main|Shauna (anime)}}
Shauna has a recurring role in {{aniseries|XY}}. She is a [[Pokémon Performer]] from [[Vaniville Town]] and one of {{an|Serena}}'s [[rival]]s. She debuted in ''[[XY039|Summer of Discovery!]]'' along with her friends {{an|Tierno}} and {{an|Trevor}}.

[[File:Shauna Serena Evolutions.png|thumb|left|250px|Shauna in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]]
